_notes: Goblet Squat · 35kg · 0 issues · Progress to 40kg recommendation. Tests zero-state issue list and green score UI.

coaching.summary_paragraph: Excellent session at 35kg. Your knee tracking was clean across all 5 reps, depth was consistently below parallel, and your tempo stayed controlled throughout. This is the most consistent set you have recorded at this weight.

posture.correction: Chest position is solid — keep the same upright posture as you move to heavier weights.

stability.correction: Knee tracking is clean. Continue reinforcing this by actively pushing knees out on every rep.

movement_quality.correction: Depth is good and consistent. At the next weight focus on maintaining this same range of motion.

tempo.correction: Tempo is well controlled. As you increase load, keep the same 3-count descent — do not let the weight rush you down.

progression.reasoning: All form thresholds met across all 5 reps with no issues detected. Score of 81 comfortably clears the 75-point progression threshold. Safe to increase to 40kg next session.
